[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A person takes a mirror selfie in a hallway or room doorway, holding a smartphone up in front of their face.

Main Subject: A person with short, dark, wavy hair holds a smartphone in their right hand toward a mirror, with their head turned slightly to look at the phone screen. The person wears a dark short-sleeve shirt with light-colored reversed-looking text across the back, and their left arm is bent as they hold the phone near eye level.

Setting: The scene appears indoors, framed by a doorway with dark wood trim. A mirror or reflective surface fills part of the background, and the lighting is bright and even, suggesting indoor ambient light.

Visual Details: The camera angle is close and slightly off-center, capturing the person from the side and back in a medium close-up. The doorway trim is warm brown wood, and the walls around it are light gray or off-white. The shirt’s light text is mirrored as it appears on the reflective surface. The smartphone is dark with a white case edge visible, and the screen area reflects light.

Visible Text: HIDDEN IN MIRROR? The shirt shows reversed text that is partially readable: “RELAXING” and “PRESENT,” with additional smaller reversed characters unclear.

Practical Summary: The image shows a person holding a phone to take a mirror selfie indoors near a doorway. Their dark shirt has large, light, mirrored lettering visible on the back.

# Notes

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, curly hair is taking a mirror selfie in what appears to be a bathroom or dressing area. He is wearing a black t-shirt with white text printed on the back, which is partially visible and appears to be stylized lettering. The man is holding a smartphone in his right hand, positioned to capture his reflection. The phone has a black case with a white circular magnetic attachment on the back.

The background consists of a textured gray wall on the left, a wooden door or frame on the right, and a dark opening behind the door, suggesting an interior space. The lighting is somewhat dramatic, with a strong light source illuminating the man's face and arm from the side, creating highlights and shadows. The overall color palette is dominated by dark tones of black, gray, and brown, with the white text on the shirt and the magnetic ring on the phone providing contrast. The mood is casual and perhaps a bit posed, typical of a selfie. The image is a medium shot, focusing on the upper body of the man and his reflection.
